content.text:
The neighbor atoms of the atom with atomic index 2 (oxygen) are:

- Atomic index 1, element: C
- Atomic index 3, element: H

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 5499. 

Regarding file organization, I recommend creating a folder named "geomconf_5499" and moving all three files (.geomconf_5499.xyz.view.json, file_log.txt, and geomconf_5499.xyz) into this folder to keep related files together.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 2, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
